title: Stone Ocean
overview: Jolyne Cujoh is framed for a crime and sent to prison. When she touches a pendant she received from her father, a mysterious power begins to awaken.

title: Prisoner FE40536: Jolyne Cujoh
overview: Jolyne begins her life in prison, but her erratic cellmate causes a major problem when she uses Jolyne's pendant to awaken her own Stand ability.

title: The Visitor (1)
overview: Jolyne encounters a strange boy who warns her not to meet with a future visitor. The next day, her father Jotaro Kujo comes to see her.

title: The Visitor (2)
overview: Jotaro tells Jolyne that Johngalli A., a former minion of DIO, is behind the recent events. Before she can react, Johngalli A.'s stand attacks them.

title: Prisoner of Love
overview: Jotaro and Jolyne awake from the dream that the enemy Stand had shown them. After they escape the visitation room, a new enemy creeps toward them.

title: Ermes's Stickers
overview: Jolyne decides to return to the prison to retrieve Jotaro's discs. An odd male prisoner appears before Ermes Costello, who has also awakened a Stand.

title: There's Six of Us!
overview: Hoping to locate Pale Snake's discs, Ermes and Jolyne join a search party for two missing inmates. During the search, Ermes notices something strange.

title: F.F.
overview: Ermes and Jolyne face off against the Stand that attacked the search party: F.F., a mass of plankton that has been granted intelligence by Pale Snake.

title: Debt Collector Mary Lynn Manson
overview: F.F. borrows the appearance of a dead inmate to be around Jolyne and Ermes. While they play catch one day, another inmate approaches them with a bet.

title: Operation Savage Guardian (Head to the Courtyard!) (1)
overview: Jolyne must quickly evade security and hand Jotaro's Stand disc over to the Speedwagon Foundation. Emporio appears and leads her to a mysterious room.

title: Operation Savage Guardian (Head to the Courtyard!) (2)
overview: Jolyne and Weather Forecast are attacked by a new enemy, Lang Rangler, whose Stand renders them weightless and creates a life-threatening vacuum.

title: Torrential Downpour Warning
overview: Before she can reach the courtyard, Jolyne encounters Father Pucchi, who she begs to let her proceed. He agrees, but has sent another pursuer ahead.

title: Smack of Love and Revenge (1)
overview: Realizing she hasn't seen Ermes for a few days, a curious Jolyne looks into her past and discovers that she came to the prison for a certain purpose.

title: Smack of Love and Revenge (2)
overview: F.F. and Jolyne try to assist Ermes in her fight against Sports Maximum, but they struggle against his Stand's ability to control the dead.

title: Ultra Security House Unit
overview: In a bid to find the bone, Jolyne intentionally gets sent to the Ultra Security House Unit. Hoping to save her, F.F. turns to Anastasia for help.

title: The Secret of Guard Westwood
overview: The Stand Survivor sparks brawls throughout the Disciplinary Wing. While fighting off a prison guard, Jolyne realizes that he is also a Stand User.

title: Enter the Drake's Dream
overview: A victorious Jolyne looks out over the remaining prisoners. An old man approaches her and reveals he is a Stand User who has been sent by Pale Snake.

title: Enter the F.F.
overview: Jolyne notices that F.F. is becoming dangerously dehydrated in the fight against Kenzou and pleads with Anastasia to step in and help, but he refuses.

title: Birth of the "Green"
overview: After Jolyne and her companions catch up to the man who has the bone, they notice strange plant growths emerging from the nearby fallen prisoners.

title: F.F. - The Witness
overview: In a boat piloted by the obedient YA-YA MA, Jolyne and Anastasia flee through the wetlands. However, YA-YA MA attacks them with an invisible ability.

title: AWAKEN
overview: After realizing the connection between Father Pucchi and Pale Snake, F.F. defeats D an' G. As YA-YA MA disintegrates, the egg it swallowed hatches.

title: Time for Heaven! New Moon! New Priest!
overview: Weather Forecast summons some rain, which saves F.F. from the brink of destruction. They reunite with Jolyne and Anastasia, but the group gets attacked.

title: Lock of the Jail!
overview: Jolyne resolves to escape Green Dolphin Island and put a stop to Father Pucchi's ambitions. A prison guard brings her a message from Pale Snake.

title: Jailbreak...
overview: Guided by the words on her hand, Jolyne fights her fading memories, evades the prison guards and reaches the hidden room — just as Mew Mew planned.

title: Bohemian Ecstatic (1)
overview: With just five days until the new moon, Father Pucchi heads north and tries to stay ahead of Jolyne, but he is held hostage outside a hospital.

title: Bohemian Ecstatic (2)
overview: Splitting up with Weather Forecast, Anastasia tries to recover his physical body after the enemy Stand Bohemian Ecstatic separates it from his soul.

title: Sky Guy
overview: As Jolyne and her companions head toward Cape Canaveral in Romeo's helicopter, they are struck by something that forces their eyelids to close.

title: Heaven Is at Hand: Three Days Until the New Moon
overview: Jolyne learns a shocking truth about Weather Forecast after her fight with Rikiel. She and Ermes enter the hospital and find a hole dug in the floor.

title: Netherworld
overview: Trapped by Versus's Stand in the memory of the crashed plane, Jolyne leaps from the aircraft and launches an attack, but it fails to affect Versus.

title: Heavy Forecast (1)
overview: With Weather Forecast's memories restored, his powerful ability Heavy Forecast triggers automatically, turning everyone affected by it into snails.

title: Heavy Forecast (2)
overview: Father Pucchi is born alongside his twin brother, who is switched with an ill-fated baby. As a young adult, he meets a strange man called DIO.

title: Heavy Forecast (3)
overview: Jolyne's group hurries to find Weather Forecast and stop his Stand. Meanwhile, Weather Forecast resolves to settle the score with Father Pucchi.

title: Gravity of the New Moon
overview: With Weather Forecast's Stand disc in hand, Jolyne and her allies head to Cape Canaveral in pursuit of Father Pucchi, whose body begins to change.

title: See Moon (1)
overview: Jolyne struggles against Father Pucchi's new Stand See Moon, a combination of Pale Snake and The Green Baby, which can invert anything it touches.

title: See Moon (2)
overview: Although See Moon has inverted Jolyne, Father Pucchi senses that she is still alive and pursues her in hopes of ending the Joestar bloodline for good.

title: Maiden Heaven (1)
overview: After shafts of bright light shine from Father Pucchi, Jolyne and her companions awake to find that he is gone and gravity has returned to normal.

title: Maiden Heaven (2)
overview: Father Pucchi's new Stand Maiden Heaven overwhelms Jolyne's group with its sheer speed. Anastasia acts as bait while Jotaro prepares to attack.

title: It's a Wonderful World
overview: The unstoppable acceleration of time brings the universe full circle. Emporio awakes in Green Dolphin Street Prison, and humanity enters a new world.
